title: tragopogon × miscellus
intro: Tragopogon × miscellus, also known as the hybrid salsify or goat's beard, is a rare and unusual plant species resulting from the cross-pollination of the Tragopogon porrifolius and Tragopogon dubius plants. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. Consuming Tragopogon × miscellus is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Tragopogon × miscellus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional medicine practices as a poultice or compress for topical application.
